# Azure DevOps Integration Setup

Configure Azure DevOps integration for the developer portal.

## Input

- **Organization**: ADO org URL
- **Project**: ADO project name
- **Components**: PAT, repos, pipelines, boards (select which)

## Expected Output

- PAT configured securely in Key Vault
- Repository discovery active in portal
- Pipelines and boards integrated
